Class JMLSpecFactory

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.translation.JMLSpecFactory
public class JMLSpecFactory extends Object
A factory for creating class invariants and operation contracts from textual JML specifications. This is the public interface to the jml.translation package.

    • createFunctionalOperationContracts

      public ImmutableSet<Contract> createFunctionalOperationContracts(String name, IProgramMethod pm, ProgramVariableCollection progVars, JMLSpecFactory.ContractClauses clauses, Map<LocationVariable, JTerm> posts, Map<LocationVariable, JTerm> axioms)
      Generate functional operation contracts.
      Parameters:
      name - base name of the contract (does not have to be unique)
      pm - the IProgramMethod to which the contract belongs
      progVars - pre-generated collection of variables for the receiver object, operation parameters, operation result, thrown exception and the pre-heap
      clauses - pre-translated JML clauses
      Returns:
      operation contracts including new functional operation contracts

    • createJMLClassInvariant

      public ClassInvariant createJMLClassInvariant(@NonNull KeYJavaType kjt, VisibilityModifier visibility, boolean isStatic, @NonNull LabeledParserRuleContext originalInv)

    • createJMLRepresents

      public ClassAxiom createJMLRepresents(@NonNull KeYJavaType kjt, VisibilityModifier visibility, @NonNull LabeledParserRuleContext originalRep, boolean isStatic) throws SLTranslationException
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException

    • createJMLRepresents

      public ClassAxiom createJMLRepresents(KeYJavaType kjt, TextualJMLRepresents textualRep) throws SLTranslationException
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException

    • createJMLClassAxiom

      public ClassAxiom createJMLClassAxiom(@NonNull KeYJavaType kjt, TextualJMLClassAxiom textual)
      Creates a class axiom from a textual JML representation. As JML axioms are always without modifiers, they are implicitly non-static and public.
      Parameters:
      kjt - the type where the axiom is declared
      textual - textual representation
      Returns:
      created ClassAxiom

    • createJMLDependencyContract

      public Contract createJMLDependencyContract(KeYJavaType kjt, LocationVariable targetHeap, LabeledParserRuleContext originalDep)

    • createJMLDependencyContract

      public Contract createJMLDependencyContract(KeYJavaType kjt, TextualJMLDepends textualDep)

    • createJMLOperationContracts

      public ImmutableSet<Contract> createJMLOperationContracts(IProgramMethod pm, TextualJMLSpecCase textualSpecCase) throws SLTranslationException
      Creates operation contracts out of the passed JML specification.
      Parameters:
      pm - corresponding program method
      textualSpecCase - textual representation of spec
      Returns:
      created JML operation contracts
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException - a translation exception

    • createJMLMergeContracts

      public ImmutableSet<MergeContract> createJMLMergeContracts(IProgramMethod method, MergePointStatement mps, TextualJMLMergePointDecl mergePointDecl) throws SLTranslationException
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException

    • createJMLBlockContracts

      public ImmutableSet<BlockContract> createJMLBlockContracts(IProgramMethod method, List<Label> labels, StatementBlock block, TextualJMLSpecCase specificationCase) throws SLTranslationException
      Creates a set of block contracts for a block from a textual specification case.
      Parameters:
      method - the method containing the block.
      labels - all labels belonging to the block.
      block - the block which the block contracts belong to.
      specificationCase - the textual specification case.
      Returns:
      a set of block contracts for a block from a textual specification case.
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException - translation exception

    • createJMLLoopContracts

      public ImmutableSet<LoopContract> createJMLLoopContracts(IProgramMethod method, List<Label> labels, LoopStatement loop, TextualJMLSpecCase specificationCase) throws SLTranslationException
      Creates a set of loop contracts for a loop from a textual specification case.
      Parameters:
      method - the method containing the block.
      labels - all labels belonging to the block.
      loop - the loop which the loop contracts belong to.
      specificationCase - the textual specification case.
      Returns:
      a set of loop contracts for a block from a textual specification case.
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException - a translation exception

    • createJMLLoopContracts

      public ImmutableSet<LoopContract> createJMLLoopContracts(IProgramMethod method, List<Label> labels, StatementBlock block, TextualJMLSpecCase specificationCase) throws SLTranslationException
      Creates a set of loop contracts for a block from a textual specification case.
      Parameters:
      method - the method containing the block.
      labels - all labels belonging to the block.
      block - the block which the loop contracts belong to.
      specificationCase - the textual specification case.
      Returns:
      a set of loop contracts for a block from a textual specification case.
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException - a translation exception

      public void translateJmlAssertCondition(JmlAssert jmlAssert, IProgramMethod pm)
      Translates the condition Term of a JmlAssert statement.
      Parameters:
      jmlAssert - the statement to create the condition for
      pm - the enclosing method

      public @Nullable String checkSetStatementAssignee(JTerm assignee)

      public void translateSetStatement(SetStatement statement, IProgramMethod pm) throws SLTranslationException
      Translates a set statement.
      Parameters:
      statement - the set statement
      pm - the enclosing method
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException

    • collectLocalVariablesVisibleTo

      protected ImmutableList<LocationVariable> collectLocalVariablesVisibleTo(Statement statement, IProgramMethod method)

    • createJMLLoopInvariant

      public LoopSpecification createJMLLoopInvariant(IProgramMethod pm, LoopStatement loop, TextualJMLLoopSpec textualLoopSpec)

    • initiallyClauseToContract

      public FunctionalOperationContract initiallyClauseToContract(InitiallyClause ini, IProgramMethod pm) throws SLTranslationException
      Translate initially clause to a contract for the given constructor. Exception is thrown if the methods passed is not a constructor. For an initially clause ini the resulting contract looks like:
      requires true;
      ensures ini;
      signals (Exception) ini;
      diverges true;
      Parameters:
      ini - initially clause
      pm - constructor
      Returns:
      the translated (functional operation) contract
      Throws:
      SLTranslationException - a translation exception
